summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AUREM standalone platform. Frontend fully functional with clean AUREM branding. Backend APIs mostly working with authentication issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Admin login failing with correct credentials (admin@aurem.live / AuremAdmin2024!)
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents access to admin dashboard and protected features

minor_issues.issue: Registration validation rejecting test email domains

integration_issues.issue: Login form correctly shows error messages but backend auth is failing

passed_tests: Homepage loads with AUREM branding (no ReRoots)
Navigation works - Vanguard, OODA, Investment, Command Center links all functional
Deploy AUREM button visible and clickable
Login form displays with email and password fields
Backend API health check at /api/health working
Platform landing page styling - dark obsidian theme (#050505) with gold accents (#D4AF37)
Clean removal of ReRoots branding - no ReRoots references found
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix platform authentication - admin login with credentials admin@aurem.live / AuremAdmin2024! is failing despite correct hash matching. Check platform_auth_router database connection and JWT token generation.
